title: MailerLite vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Drip: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing tool for your business.
h1: MailerLite vs Drip: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: MailerLite and Drip are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite excels as an affordable, feature-rich option for small businesses and freelancers, while Drip specializes in e-commerce automation and revenue tracking. This comparison will help you decide which platform aligns best with your business goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a limited budget
You want to start with a free plan and upgrade gradually
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys built-in
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need revenue attribution
You want advanced SMS and onsite campaign capabilities
You require sophisticated segmentation and automation workflows

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for budget-conscious small businesses thanks to its free tier and lower pricing, while Drip is superior for e-commerce stores requiring advanced tracking and revenue attribution. MailerLite has higher customer satisfaction ratings overall.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Drip?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $9/month. Drip has no free tier and starts at $39/month, making it a premium option best suited for established e-commerce businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports, making migration relatively straightforward. However, complex automation workflows may require manual reconfiguration in MailerLite, so plan accordingly for the transition.
